18 seconds. Isolated showers.

7 feet. Wave Detail: East 6 feet at 7 seconds and south 4 feet at
20 seconds. Isolated showers. 
.SATURDAY NIGHT...East northeast winds 15 to 20 knots. Seas 6 to
7 feet. Wave Detail: East 6 feet at 7 seconds and south 4 feet at
18 seconds. Isolated showers. 
.SUNDAY...East northeast winds 15 to 20 knots. Seas 6 to 8 feet.
